meta.title: The First Female Green Beret & Other Top Stories From Sandboxx News
meta.description:
Subscribe and 🔔 to Sandboxx YouTube so you never miss a video. 

It's Saturday 11 July 2020.  Stay up to date on what's happening in the military with Sandboxx News. 

Here are this week's top stories from Sandboxx News: 

Here’s what spec ops vets and female soldiers think of the first female Green Beret
Get the full story 👉 https://sbxx.us/3fntAej

Military voting: How to vote via absentee ballot
Get the full story 👉 https://sbxx.us/2ZYYtPV

The dogs of war: How man’s best friend serves in the military
Get the full story 👉 https://sbxx.us/2APlts1

Here’s why the pentagon says you should delete TikTok
Get the full story 👉 https://sbxx.us/2OhS1he

This is what it’s like to take an F-16 to the absolute limit
Get the full story 👉 https://sbxx.us/2ZZd25T

*The appearance of DoD visual information does not imply or constitute DoD endorsement.

#femalegreenberet #militarynews #sandboxxnews #militaryworkingdog #f16 #militaryvoting

0:00 Intro
1:04 What Spec Ops Vets and Female Soldiers Think of the First Female Green Beret
3:20 Military Voting 
3:44 The Dogs of War
4:11 Why You Should Delete TikTok
5:55 Taking an F-16 to the Absolute Limit
